title: Stavanger Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Stavanger, with a Z-Score of -3.51. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current temperature in Stavanger is significantly lower than average, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 13.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 73%, and the wind speed is 17.3 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions. 
 The absence of Cooling Degree Days (CDD) indicates that no cooling is required, and the focus is on heating to maintain a comfortable temperature.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
